sprint.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-2 unblock. Swarm health resolution.

kernel-squad.task: Investigate #1276: PreToolUse hook exits non-zero after 1st write. Suspected: unknown-command warn+audit (#179) treats repeated actions as escalation without session persistence (PreToolUse has no --store sqlite). Check non-zero exit semantics for allowed-by-default actions.

kernel-sr.task: Assign KE-2 (ActionContext, issue #917) — 0/4 checkboxes, no PR, 5 EM cycles unstarted.

human-reviewer.task: Review PR #1282 (ci: site-check.yml) — fixes site-only PR CI blocker #1267. Merge to unblock 4 stalled site PRs.

site-squad.task: After PR #1282 lands, rebase and merge: #1258 (site stats v2.9.0), #1270 (CLI cmd count), #1271 (Codex/Gemini + action types), #1275 (docs sync)

marketing-squad.task: Audit squad manifests for accurate agent count, update site/index.html swarm section (issue #1259)

governance-false-positive-1254.task: Fix No-Governance-Self-Modification false positive on gh --body args (issue #1254)
governance-false-positive-1254.note: PR #1280 merged — extractBaseCommand skips command scan for gh commands

cloud-version-2.9.2.task: Upgrade @red-codes/agentguard to 2.9.2 in cloud and analytics repos

site-ci-blocker.task: Fix site-only PRs blocked by branch protection (issue #1267)
site-ci-blocker.note: PR #1282 created — site-check.yml with instant-pass lint/test jobs for site-only changes. Awaiting merge.

blockers.description: Swarm health P0 — 85.7% agents stuck (5th+ cycle). Human intervention required.
KE-2 unstarted — 5 EM cycles, no assignee, 0/4 checkboxes. Sprint goal at serious risk.
P1 dogfood: PreToolUse exits non-zero after 1st write — 'allowed by default | (attempt 1/3)'. Possible regression from #179 unknown-command warn+audit. Blocks QA multi-write sessions.

prQueue.notes: PR #1262 and #1269 CI running after branch update — merge when green. PR #1282 (CI fix) needs human review. PRs #1258/#1270/#1271/#1275 unblocked once #1282 lands.
